title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss how they are adopting AI coding tools at scale. The panel covers workflow changes, productivity measurement, and organizational approaches including alpha teams, small pods, and re-platforming efforts.
